title: Chat
noPersistenceWarning: Note: This system does not store any chat history. Messages are only forwarded via real-time channels when both parties are online. To keep history, ensure your browser cache is not cleared.
addMembersDesc: Add new members to the group
groupEncryptionKeyPlaceholder: Leave empty to use default key
saveHistoryDesc: Save chat history to local browser storage
enableWebRTCDesc: Use P2P direct connection whenever possible for speed and privacy
terminalActive: Communication terminal active, waiting for commands...
encryptionKeyPlaceholder: Custom key used for encrypting messages
defaultNicknameDesc: This nickname will be used when guests join via this invite
inviteCreatedAndCopied: Invite created and link copied to clipboard
confirmDeleteInvite: Are you sure you want to delete this invite? Associated guests won't be able to log in.
selectRoom: Select a room to start chatting
searchUserPlaceholder: Search by ID, nickname, or username...
callFailed: Failed to start call, please check microphone permissions
encryptionKeyNote: Both parties must use the same key to decrypt messages (Each conversation can have an independent key)
encryptionHint: This key is used to encrypt your messages locally. It is NEVER sent to the server
mic_access_failed: Failed to access microphone. Please check permissions.
enterSessionKeyPrompt: Enter private session key for this conversation (not saved):
system_crashed: Chat system crashed, please refresh the page
webrtc_failed: P2P connection with {{name}} failed. Falling back to server relay.
rate_limit_exceeded: Rate limit exceeded. Please wait a moment.
guestNote: Guest mode is for temporary chat only. Do not send sensitive information in this mode.
selectToStart: Select a conversation from the left to start
typeMessage: Type your message, press Enter to send...
offline: Offline - messages will be sent when connected
confirmClearTargetHistory: Are you sure you want to clear all local chat history with this contact?
p2pRequiredToast: This feature requires a P2P connection
p2pHelpContent: When both users are online, the system automatically establishes a secure peer-to-peer encrypted connection.
p2pHelpDetail1: • P2P connection is more secure, messages transmit directly between devices
p2pHelpDetail2: • Faster transmission speed and lower latency
p2pHelpDetail3: • P2P supported features: Voice/Video calls, File transfer
p2pHelpDetail4: • When the recipient is offline, messages are queued and delivered when they come online
largeFileTip: Tip: For large files, using the system's 'File Manager' share feature is recommended for a better experience.
micAccessFailed: Failed to access microphone. Please check permissions.
media_access_failed: Failed to access media devices. Please check permissions.
